sentence_reviews.text: Multiple competing goals and hard constraints are optimized jointly rather than collapsed into one unconstrained score.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Optimization theory, Game theory & decision theory.
